nasb.text: Chenaniah, chief of the Levites, was in charge of the singing; he gave instruction in singing because he was skillful.

esv.text: Chenaniah, leader of the Levites in music, should direct the music, for he understood it.

cnv.text: 利未支派的領袖基拿尼雅專責音樂，又教人音樂，因為他精通音樂。

ccb.text: 利未人的族长基拿尼雅善于歌唱，是歌乐手的领班。
